identity.name: RangeFinder VA/MD
identity.description: A high-performance directory for shooting ranges in Virginia and Maryland. The design prioritizes clarity, data density, and a 'tactical' aesthetic that resonates with the target audience (gun owners, competitors, hunters).

usage_rules.ctas: Safety Orange (#F97316) for primary actions. High visibility.
usage_rules.borders: 1px solid Slate-200 (Light) or Slate-700 (Dark). Crisp edges.

visual_enhancers.borders: Sharp corners (rounded-sm or rounded-none). 2px borders on active elements.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle 'grid' patterns or 'noise' overlays on dark backgrounds to simulate technical surfaces.
visual_enhancers.icons: Phosphor Icons (Bold/Fill weight) or Lucide (Stroke width 2px).
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Minimal. Use solid semi-transparent layers (bg-slate-900/90) with blur for HUD feel.

buttons.style: Rectangular or slightly rounded (rounded-sm). Uppercase text. Bold.

cards.style: Flat, bordered (border-slate-200). No massive shadows. 'Data Card' aesthetic.
cards.header: Bold, uppercase title with a colored accent bar on the left.

inputs.style: Square, heavy border (border-2). Focus ring is sharp (ring-offset-0).

badges.style: Square, uppercase, tracking-wider. Solid colors (bg-slate-900 text-white) or outline.

layout.grid_system: Bento Grid for categories. Split View (50/50 or 40/60) for Search Results (Map/List).
layout.spacing: Dense but structured. Use 'gap-4' for data, 'gap-12' for sections.

motion.hover: Instant feedback. Color shifts, border thickening. No floaty movements.

media.image_style: High contrast, desaturated or cool-toned. Focus on equipment, landscapes, and focus.

accessibility.contrast: AA Standard minimum. AAA for small text.
accessibility.reduced_motion: Respect user settings. Disable map animations if requested.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Barlow Condensed' from Google Fonts for all headings. Import it in index.css.
Implement a 'Split View' layout for the search page: Map on one side (sticky), scrollable list on the other.
Use the 'Safety Orange' (#F97316) sparingly for high-impact actions (Search, Book, Claim).
Ensure the 'Range Detail' page looks like a 'Technical Spec Sheet' - organized, grid-based, data-heavy.
Use 'Lucide-React' icons with a stroke width of 2px for a robust look.
For the Map, use a dark or desaturated custom style if possible, or standard map with custom markers.
Do not use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl. Stick to rounded-sm or rounded-md max.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop' - generic, centered, gradient-heavy designs.
Create depth through borders and layering, not just shadows.
Mobile-first responsive design is critical for field use.
